{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Sect of Twin Stars
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Sect of Twin Stars]] is an organization that appears confident.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Sect of Twin Stars]] finds [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
